surface.name: Airbyte Cloud Sample Data source to first successful sync
surface.selection_basis: Airbyte Cloud is the hosted onboarding path. Official docs direct developers who do not want to self-manage to cloud.airbyte.com/signup, and the getting-started source guide uses Marketplace Sample Data as the popular test source before destination and connection setup. PyAirbyte and local Core are local/self-managed alternatives, not the Cloud onboarding path.

alternatives_considered.name: PyAirbyte local read
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Local Python toolkit without Cloud account onboarding.

alternatives_considered.name: Airbyte Core abctl local
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Self-managed Docker/Kubernetes path; quickstart says skip it and sign up for Cloud to start syncing now.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create an Airbyte Cloud trial workspace, configure Sample Data, add a destination, and complete a first successful sync.
assumed_prior_state: No Airbyte Cloud account or workspace exists.
A browser is available; no local Docker or Python SDK is assumed.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: An Airbyte Cloud connection completes a successful sync from Sample Data into a configured destination.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The connection page shows a successful sync status after Set up connection and initiating a sync.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Cloud trial begins after first successful sync; add-source and add-connection guides end at initiating syncs from the connection page.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: Cloud onboarding is complete when data moves: trial credits start after the first successful sync. Credential visibility alone is not first success.

prerequisites.requirement: Supported browser to use the Cloud UI.

primary_path.action: Sign up for Airbyte Cloud and open the workspace.
primary_path.success_signal: Sources and Destinations navigation is reachable.

primary_path.action: Add a Sample Data source from Marketplace and complete Set up source so the connection test succeeds.
details: Docs recommend Sample Data when unsure which source to pick.
primary_path.success_signal: Source test succeeds and New Connection is offered.

primary_path.action: Add a destination connector and complete its setup test.
Create a connection linking the source and destination, configure schema, and click Set up connection.
Initiate a sync from the connection page.

friction_gates.description: Cloud signup is required before connectors and syncs.

sources.title: Manage billing and credits (Start a trial)
evidence_supported: Trial begins after first successful sync

uncertainties.question: Which destination does Cloud onboarding recommend first for Sample Data on a brand-new trial?
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Add-connection docs require a destination but do not mandate one specific first destination for Sample Data.
